name: Stock Replenishment via Purchase Order
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can use automated stock replenishment to generate purchase orders based on stock levels and sales velocity, helping maintain optimal inventory without manual monitoring. This improves your retail operations efficiency by automatically identifying reorder needs across your product catalog, with properly configured replenishment workflows typically reducing stockouts and improving inventory turnover through data-driven ordering."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Understanding stock replenishment involves recognizing reorder point calculations, minimum/maximum stock level settings, and supplier lead time considerations to help retail operators focus on the right automated procurement workflows, ensuring your retail strategy consistently drives better inventory availability and reduced carrying costs outcomes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock Replenishment is an intelligent reordering process, creating Purchase Orders for both Products and Packages through the use of one of three formulas to calculate a suggested reorder quantity (instead of manually calculating the required quantities yourself). These formulas make it efficient in creating the Purchase Orders by factoring in the current stock levels, historical sales periods, and more."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This article explains the Stock Replenishment via Purchase Order feature in more detail. Refer to the Inventory - Stock Replenishment via Transfer article for more information on using the Stock Replenishment feature to transfer stock within your Outlets."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Stock Replenishment Formulas"}], "data-id": "stock-replenishment-formulas"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express has 3 different formulas available to select from to calculate a recommended stock reordering quantity."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once a formula has been selected the system will recommend a quantity to be re-ordered (this can be manually adjusted as required). Using filters and various preferences you can fine-tune your requirements and quickly create a number of Transfer Requests ready for processing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the headings below to view more detail."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The system only suggests a reorder quantity - you can overwrite the quantity as required."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi9mEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi9mEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-10T013806.213.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/365-stock-replenishment-via-purchase-order#sales-formula", "children": [{"text": "Sales Formula"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Sales Formula is based directly on product sales up to a maximum of 12 months from the current date."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The system re-orders the same quantity of products that were sold in your store during your selected "Sales Period" (this time frame is defined in the Filters)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Formula example:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales Period"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "30 days"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Number of product units sold in the sales period"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "20 units"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suggested re-order quantity", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "20 units", "bold": true}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-90da3980"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/365-stock-replenishment-via-purchase-order#msl-formula", "children": [{"text": "Minimum Stock Level (MSL) Formula"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products within Retail Express have a Minimum Stock Level setting (MSL) for each of your individual Outlets. This is your ideal stocking holding figure, and may vary for each Outlet."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi9rEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi9rEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "products_editproduct_minimumstocklevel.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Access your Minimum Stock Levels setting by "}, {"text": "editing a product", "bold": true}, {"text": " and clicking the "}, {"text": "Inventory", "bold": true}, {"text": " Tab, or by doing a "}, {"text": "Mass Download/Mass Upload ", "bold": true}, {"text": "(ensure you include your Outlet) and editing the MinQty column on the Outlet tab."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Stock Replenishment MSL formula checks inventory levels to determine which products have a stock quantity below the MSL value. The suggested re-order quantity is the equivalent of the number of units that would be required to bring the stock quantity back to the Minimum Stock Level."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The calculation includes all of the following levels to determine the overall total inventory value:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Available"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Transit-In"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Received"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Requested"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On-Order"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Prerequisite: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Your products must have a Minimum Stock Level configured to use this formula - see the "}, {"text": "Inventory - Create and Edit a Product"}, {"text": " article for more information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Formula example:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Formula used:"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suggested re-order Quantity = MSL - (Available + Transit-In + Received + On-Order + Requested)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product MSL for Outlet A"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "10 units"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Current stock level"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4 units"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suggested re-order quantity", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "6 units", "bold": true}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-f2cc0ade"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/365-stock-replenishment-via-purchase-order#runrate-formula", "children": [{"text": "Run Rate Formula"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Run Rate formula is a more detailed formula taking into account historical sales information, product settings and current inventory levels."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Daily Run Rate"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Average quantity sold per day (using historical sales data to calculate this average automatically)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can specify how many days the Run Rate should take into consideration during Step 2 of the transfer process. Entering a larger number will result in a more accurate prediction."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Run Rate will change all the time based on how many products are sold. Some products are seasonal and have peak and low sales periods."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lead Time"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The time it takes to order your stock from your suppliers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lead time is entered on the "}, {"text": "Edit Product"}, {"text": " window in the value of days e.g. a Lead Time of 4 means 4 days from ordering to receiving the stock from the supplier."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Alternatively, you can select a global Lead Time during Step 2 of the Stock Replenishment process; all products on the transfer will use the same Lead Time."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Inventory Levels"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following inventory levels are combined to calculate the current Inventory level for the product:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Available"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Transit-In"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Received"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "OnOrder"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Requested"}]}]}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-e3a07a7c"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using these data fields the system is able to suggest a re-order quantity to ensure that you have enough stock to cover the typical average of sales of this product."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you're heading into a peak sales period you may need to adjust the numbers manually to account for greater sales e.g. Christmas retail trading will not be reflected in the trading figures for the months prior to Christmas. Using the average Run Rate may not result in an accurate prediction."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Formula example:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Formula Used"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suggested re-order Quantity =  (Daily Run Rate x Lead Time) - (Available + Transit-In + Received + OnOrder + Requested)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Daily Run Rate"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "10 units"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lead Time"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4 days"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Current Stock Level"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "12 units"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suggested Re-Order Quantity", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "28 units", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Calculation: (10 x 4) - (12)"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-ad54f562"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Using Stock Replenishment via Purchase Order"}], "data-id": "using-stock-replenishment-via-purchase-order"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Inventory > Stock Replenishment > Stock Re-Orders via Purchase Order", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your "}, {"text": "Order Quantity Formula", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Continue", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Refine Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Outlet/s", "bold": true}, {"text": " to create Purchase Orders for"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Hold the Ctrl button to select multiple Outlets."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select from the remaining "}, {"text": "Search Fields ", "bold": true}, {"text": "as required ("}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/365-stock-replenishment-via-purchase-order#h_01GK0ATW31HW174VTB3S1VJ1NN", "children": [{"text": "see below"}]}, {"text": " for a detailed explanation of each option)"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Hide Where Order Qty = 0 ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tick box to hide products where an order is not required (i.e. the suggested reorder quantity is zero); this will reduce the number of results and simplify your order creation."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The proposed quantities to be ordered will be displayed in the "}, {"text": "Qty ", "bold": true}, {"text": "column (detailed information on each of the columns on the Results tab can be found further below)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20230918at43546AM.05T5g00000v6NYAEA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20230918at43546AM.05T5g00000v6NYAEA2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 900, "height": 554}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Export to Excel ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to export a list of proposed Reorder products"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " to save the Replenishment Run and return to it at another time (the Purchase Orders will not be created at this point)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Process Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " to create the Purchase Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your "}, {"text": "Delivery Details", "bold": true}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiA1EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiA1EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 - 2023-07-10T013826.497.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Individual Store Delivery will create a Purchase Order to each Outlet, while Consolidate Single Delivery will deliver all stock to a single outlet, and create Transfers from the single Outlet to the individual Outlet; refer to the "}, {"text": "Purchase Orders - Consolidating Delivery to a single Outlet with Transfers"}, {"text": " article for more information."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Orders will be generated; when complete click "}, {"text": "Proceed", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Step 3 of 3 review page will be displayed, this page is separated into two sections:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A table at the top with a list of Purchase Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A display at the bottom showing the content of the PO"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiA6EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiA6EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-10T013831.745.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the link in the "}, {"text": "POID", "bold": true}, {"text": " column to view each Purchase Order"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Send & Order ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to email the Purchase Order to the Supplier and simultaneously update the Purchase Order status to "On-Order"."}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The email is sent to the address stored in the Supplier settings in Settings > Suppliers, although you can manually update the email address on the Stock Replenishment window if required (it will only be temporarily used for this order, and not update the Supplier details."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Alternatively, you can click "}, {"text": "Print", "bold": true}, {"text": " then "}, {"text": "Place On Order ", "bold": true}, {"text": "for your Purchase Orders so finalise the process without emailing your Suppliers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat the steps for ", "bold": true}, {"text": "each order", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "As each Purchase Order is placed On Order the "}, {"text": "Sent/Ordered ", "bold": true}, {"text": "column will display the time stamp of the update"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once each order shows the Sent/Ordered date, the process has been completed"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders cannot be received unless they have been placed On Order. If you navigate away from this window, you can still access the Purchase Orders that were created via Inventory > PO Management > PO Manager (the orders will have the status of "Incomplete")"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Search fields"}], "data-id": "search-fields"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Filters tab is made up of three sections:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search Fields (covered below)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Refine Search"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Refine by Attributes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240614at103902AM.05TJ1000004xzpiMAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240614at103902AM.05TJ1000004xzpiMAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 500, "height": 211}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Refine Search and Refine By Attributes sections are self-explanatory, but the details of the Search fields are covered further below."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fields", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales From/Sales To "}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The sales period for which to suggest a re-order quantity of all products made in this period. This can be run to a maximum of 12 months from the date the report is run."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Run Rate Period"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The number of days to consider the average units sold per day e.g. "60" is the equivalent of 60 days."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Run Rate will change all the time based on how many products are sold. Some products are seasonal and have peak and low sales periods. Selecting a longer Run Rate period will result in more accurate suggestions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can select this field based on the number of days previous, or from a specific period in time e.g. if preparing for Christmas trade, you could select the Christmas period from the previous year."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock Levels"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The available options for this field are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Some AVL Some Stores - At least 1 Outlet selected in the Search Filters has an Available quantity above 0"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Zero AVL All Stores - All Outlets selected in the Search Filters have an Available quantity of 0 or less"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Zero AVL Some Stores - At least 1 Outlet selected in the Search Filters has an Available quantity 0 or below"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sort Direction"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Which direction the report should be sorted by - ascending or descending. Clicking on a column heading in the Results tab will sort the results by that column e.g. Product ID."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Display Product Attributes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The results tab shows only the default attributes automatically - Brad, Size, Colour and Season. If you have created "}, {"text": "custom Attributes"}, {"text": " these can be displayed by selecting "All""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lead Time"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The number of days it takes to reorder the stock from the supplier. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Entering a number here will override the default Lead Time set at the product level, this time only, for all products.
